tools.name: get_vendor_commitments
tools.description: Get the seven tracked commercial commitments (AUP, no-train default, output ownership, IP indemnity program, retention default, deprecation notice, safety framework version) for a frontier AI vendor. Each commitment carries the quoted primary-source text, source URL, and effective date.

tools.name: get_framework_version_history
tools.description: Get the full version ledger of a frontier AI lab's safety framework (Responsible Scaling Policy, Preparedness Framework, Frontier Safety Framework, or equivalent). Returns every published version, effective date, published changelog, and primary source URL.

tools.name: search_corpus
tools.description: Search Anteroom's tracked corpus of AI-relevant regulatory provisions across jurisdictions (EU AI Act, US state laws, sectoral rules, international frameworks) and legal lenses. Returns matching provisions with primary-source URLs and confidence tags.

tools.name: get_partnership_pattern
tools.description: Get a named strategic AI partnership pattern with its plain-language description, example clauses, kill-list moves, scholarly anchors, and real-world precedent anchors.

tools.name: get_partnerships_by_pattern
tools.description: List every tracked public AI strategic partnership that Anteroom has classified as an instance of a given pattern. Returns partnership metadata with permalink to the primary-source-anchored deal page.
